_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Availability and capacity management involves ensuring services are available with as little downtime or disruption as possible, and that we have sufficient resources to support emerging business needs.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct capacity planning for data infrastructure, including growth projection analysis, resource utilization trending, and scaling recommendations aligned with business demand forecasts.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.452), TF-T-007 (TF, cosine: 0.437).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.399). Shared vocabulary: [business, capacity]. DDaT-only terms [availability, available, disruption, downtime, emerging, ensuring] vs WIDAI-only terms [aligned, analysis, conduct, data, demand, forecasts] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.871, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 28-word DDaT element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Availability and capacity management involves ensuring services are available wi" and "Conduct capacity planning for data infrastructure, including growth projection a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 > STS 0.399 (gap +0.088). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [business, capacity] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.3%. Shared tokens: [business, capacity]. DDaT-only: [availability, available, disruption, downtime, emerging, ensuring]. WIDAI-only: [aligned, analysis, conduct, data, demand, forecasts].
